meta.text:
DIVENDRA PARAMENDRAN 
Software Engineer 

+94 771831009| divendraparamendran226@gmail.com |GitHub 

Objective 

Detail-oriented and motivated IT undergraduate with a passion for quality assurance and software testing. Strong 
understanding of web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript), MERN and software development, with experience in 
manual testing, bug reporting, and usability analysis. Eager to apply my skills in QA methodologies and testing 
processes to ensure high-quality web solutions. 

Technical Skills 

• Programming Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C, Kotlin, C++, Python (Basics), Kotlin. 
• Frontend: React.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, HTML5, CSS 
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js, JWT, PHP 
• Databases: MongoDB, MySQL 
• Cloud & DevOps: Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Postman) 
• Security & Authentication: JWT, OAuth, bcrypt.js 
• Development Tools: Git, Figma, Postman, VS Code, Eclipse 
• Methodologies: Agile, Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) 
• Familiar with: System Designing & Architecture, Load Balancing, Server Management 
• Mobile Development: Android Development (Kotlin). 
• Expertise in: Data Structures & Algorithm, Data Analytics , Software Development Lifecycles, OOP concept 

Key Strengths 

• Quick learner with strong problem-solving abilities. 
• Passionate about cloud computing, DevOps, and mainframe modernization. 
• Comfortable working with CI/CD pipelines, cloud services, and security best practices. 
• Strong research skills (Google searches, Stack Overflow, GitHub Issues troubleshooting). 

Main Projects 

Valampuri -Hotel Management System 

 Valampuri 

The Hotel Management System is an advanced platform developed to optimize the management processes of 
Valampuri, catering to the operational needs of both staff and guests. The system offers a seamless experience for 
room bookings, customer profile management, and image storage while ensuring security and reliability. 

• Built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and used JavaScript for ensuring 

a responsive and scalable application. 

• Powered by Node.js and Express, providing a robust RESTful API architecture for handling room 

bookings and user management. 

• Used MongoDB as the NoSQL database for storing all booking, customer, and room-related data 

efficiently. 

• Integrated Firebase for real-time media storage and retrieval. 
• Authentication and Security: Used bcrypt.js for password hashing and JWT for secure user 

authentication and session handling. 

Technologies Used – React.js, CSS, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Firebase Storage, bcrypt.js, JWT 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Halo - E-commerce Website 

 Halo 

Halo is a dynamic platform developed to provide an efficient and seamless online shopping experience. It 
allows users to browse products, add them to the cart, and complete transactions while offering a secure and 
responsive user interface. 

• Built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) for a robust and scalable e-
commerce platform. 
• Implemented secure user authentication with JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for managing user sessions. 
• Employed Stripe for secure online payment processing. 
• Powered by Node.js and Express, providing a robust - API architecture. 
• Used Material UI and Ant Design for modern, customizable UI components, enhancing the overall user 
experience. 
• Integrated Stripe for payment processing and i18next for internationalization, allowing support for 
multiple languages. 
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment and updates. 

Technologies Used – React.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT, Stripe, Material UI, Ant Design,, 
i18next, React Redux 

Mini Projects 

❖ VEHIBOOK -online vehicle Booking 

VEHIBOOK 

VEHIBOOK is an online vehicle booking website make customer the vehicle seamless and provide good services, 
Designed and implemented a user-friendly, ensuring a seamless experience 

• Developed a car rental booking system with features for booking, editing, and canceling order. 
• 

Implemented a user-friendly interface using JSP, HTML, and CSS with dynamic interactions powered by 
JavaScript, and used MySQL for database management. 

Technology Stack: Java, JSP, Servlet, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, MySQL 

❖ Green-mart – Online products selling website 

GreenMart 

Green-mart is a mini product selling website to sell home made products. User can buy the products or can sent the products 
to the loving one with gift wrapped. 

• Built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) for a robust and scalable e-

commerce platform. 

• Use Tailwind CSS for user friendly interface 
• Configured Gmail service in Nodemailer to send OTP emails for user verification in a Node.js application. 

Technologies Used – React.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS 

❖ LOTRACK – Online location Tracker Platform 

LOTRACK 

The Employee Tracking App is a real-time location tracking system designed for efficient employee monitoring. The platform 
allows secure login, continuous location updates, and seamless data management. 

Integrated Google OAuth authentication. 
Implemented real-time location tracking via the Geolocation API and sent updates to the backend. 

• 
• 
• Secured backend with Express.js and session management via cookies. 

Technologies Used: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Axios, Passport.js, Google OAuth, Geolocation 
API 

Education 

▪ Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (Reading) (SLIIT -2026) 
▪ Diploma in Information Technology (SLIIT -2024) 
▪ Data Science Foundation- Great Learning Academy
